summary: Frontend-only Phase 1+2+3 testing of Ko|Do · Vault. All 10 requested scenarios pass: client config load, header brand, setup form validation (too-short, mismatch, disabled-until-conditions-met), happy-path setup with PBKDF2 600k → unlocked dashboard, lock → login flow, wrong/correct password handling, reload-while-unlocked → returns to locked (no key in sessionStorage), and destroy vault flow (SLETT confirmation + localStorage cleared).
critical_code_review_comments: sessionStorage holds 'kodo-vault.session.lastUnlockAt' timestamp — this is a non-secret diagnostic value (not a key/derivative), so it does not violate the 'key only in memory' invariant. Confirmed via runtime check: no key/master fields persisted across reload. Acceptable but worth documenting in code comments to avoid future confusion.

Webpack HMR WebSocket fails with 502 in preview env (wss://...:_next/webpack-hmr). Cosmetic-only — does not affect functionality, but produces console noise. Consider gating HMR off in production-like preview builds.
VaultDashboard 'Legg til oppføring' button is disabled with title 'Kommer i Fase 5' — fine for current phase, just flagging it must be wired up in Fase 5.
MasterPasswordSetup uses `useEffect` to clear error on `[pwd, confirm]` change — works, but consider clearing in onChange handlers to avoid the eslint-disable on exhaustive-deps.
test_credentials: Test password used: TestVaultPass123! (16 chars). No backend creds (zero-knowledge, client-side only).
seed_data_creation: None — localStorage cleared at start of test run; vault destroyed at end; clean state restored.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1+2+3 verified end-to-end via Playwright. Use data-testid selectors: master-password-setup, setup-password-input, setup-confirm-input, setup-understood-checkbox, setup-submit-btn, setup-error-too-short, setup-error-mismatch, setup-error-banner, vault-dashboard-empty, header-status-unlocked/locked, header-lock-btn, master-password-login, login-password-input, login-submit-btn, login-error-banner, login-destroy-btn, confirm-dialog, confirm-dialog-text-input (requires 'SLETT'), confirm-dialog-confirm/cancel/x. PBKDF2 600k iter takes ~1-3s — use timeouts of 20s on first unlock/setup actions. localStorage key for blob: 'kodo-vault.blob.v1'. sessionStorage uses 'kodo-vault.session.lastUnlockAt' (timestamp only, not the key — verified). Backend (FastAPI) is intentionally NOT used in V1.
